panels.title: Services reporting traffic
panels.description: Should be 6: product, order, cart, user, payment, notification.

targets.expr:
count(((
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
)) > 0)

panels.title: Request rate by service (verify 6 lines)
panels.description: Each line = one microservice. If fewer than 6, check Prometheus scrape targets.

targets.expr:
(
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
)

options.content:
# SLI, SLO & SLA — Fundamentals

| Term | Definition |
|------|------------|
| **SLI** | Measured signal (availability, latency, errors) |
| **SLO** | Internal target for an SLI |
| **SLA** | Customer-facing commitment |

**Metrics in this cluster** (all 6 services):

| Service | Stack | Request metrics |
|---------|-------|-----------------|
| product-service, order-service | Go | `http_requests_total` (`status`) |
| cart-service | Node (custom) | `http_requests_total` (`status_code`) |
| user-service | Node (prom-bundle) | `http_request_duration_seconds_count` (`status_code`) |
| payment-service, notification-service | Flask | `flask_http_request_total` (`status`) |

targets.expr:
sum((
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service", status=~"2.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service", status_code=~"2.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service", status_code=~"2.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service", status=~"2.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
)) / sum((
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
))

sum((
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service", status=~"5.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service", status_code=~"5.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service", status_code=~"5.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service", status=~"5.."} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
)) / sum((
  label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"product-service|order-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or label_replace(sum(rate(http_requests_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app="cart-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
  or sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", service="user-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (service)
  or label_replace(sum(rate(flask_http_request_total{kubernetes_namespace="ecommerce", app=~"payment-service|notification-service"} [$__rate_interval])) by (app), "service", "$1", "app", "(.*)")
))
